overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked, neon-lit multi-level urban plaza at night. The environment features heavy Japanese-inspired cyberpunk aesthetics with cherry blossoms, digital billboards, and reflective wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated observation balcony overlooking multi-level plaza

events.description: camera pans right to reveal the grand staircase and lower plaza levels with cherry blossom trees
character turns from observation position and begins walking along the balcony pathway

agents.ego_description: standing on glass balcony looking down at illuminated plaza, then turning to walk along the elevated pathway

entered.detail: transparent glass safety railing along the elevated walkway edge
sunken plaza with multiple tiers and neon lighting visible below
trees with pink blossoms lining the lower plaza levels
wide illuminated stairs connecting plaza levels with cyan neon accents
large illuminated advertisement screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: From an elevated glass balcony, the camera overlooks a sprawling multi-level cyberpunk plaza illuminated by neon purple and cyan lights. Cherry blossom trees line the walkways below as the character observes the scene before turning to walk along the rain-slicked pathway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air plaza with outdoor dining and yellow umbrellas

events.description: heavy rain becomes clearly visible, creating reflections on wet tiled surfaces
moving from elevated walkway down to main plaza level with outdoor seating area

agents.ego_description: walking down to the plaza level, passing through rain-soaked open area with outdoor dining and seated patrons

notable_agents.action: sitting at outdoor table under yellow umbrella, dining

entered.detail: large yellow umbrellas sheltering outdoor dining tables
arrangement of tables and chairs for plaza dining
large illuminated corporate signage on building facade
rain-soaked tiled ground reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The character descends into the open plaza where heavy rain creates shimmering reflections on the wet tiled ground. Yellow umbrellas shelter outdoor dining areas beneath the glowing Kiroshi building sign, while neon advertisements illuminate the rainy night and patrons sit at outdoor tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with vending machines

events.description: entering covered walkway with glass ceiling and illuminated vending machines
passing close to vending machines and digital poster walls on right side

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway lined with vending machines and digital advertisements, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera in covered walkway wearing casual attire

entered.detail: rows of illuminated automated vending machines with digital displays
glass and metal roof structure providing shelter from rain
illuminated advertisement panels lining the walkway walls

segments.scene_description: Moving into a sheltered walkway with a glass ceiling, the character passes rows of illuminated vending machines and digital poster walls. The rain continues overhead but the path is covered, with neon cyan lighting reflecting off the wet surfaces as pedestrians walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with massive vertical billboards and stairs

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open plaza with towering digital billboards and pink neon lighting
turning left to follow plaza pathway, passing character with glowing red sword

agents.ego_description: walking through open plaza surrounded by massive digital advertisements, turning left along the pathway past other characters

notable_agents.action: standing near outdoor seating with glowing red sword on back wearing red dress

entered.detail: tall building-sized digital advertisement screens displaying animated content
glass safety barrier along the edge of the elevated plaza section
large overhead structure illuminated with bright pink neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast plaza dominated by towering digital billboards and vibrant pink neon lighting. The character passes a distinctive figure with a glowing red sword while navigating around outdoor seating areas and grand stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed elevated pedestrian bridge with glass railings

events.description: entering narrow enclosed walkway with concrete walls on left and glass railing on right
lighting becomes dimmer and more enclosed with prominent floor lighting strips

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow elevated walkway with glass railing overlooking lower plaza levels, following another pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the elevated walkway at a distance

entered.detail: narrow pedestrian bridge with roof overhead and walls on one side
transparent glass barrier overlooking the lower levels of the plaza
solid concrete wall surface along the left side of the path
structural elements and signage of the overhead pedestrian bridge

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow elevated walkway enclosed by concrete walls on one side and glass railings on the other. The environment becomes more confined with overhead structures blocking the rain and neon floor lights illuminating the path, while maintaining views of the lower plaza levels through the glass barrier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated vantage point down into the heart of a rain-soaked, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins on a glass balcony overlooking a sprawling multi-level cityscape bathed in purple and cyan light, where cherry blossom trees line the walkways below. As the camera descends, the scene opens into the main plaza where heavy rain creates shimmering reflections on wet tiled ground and yellow umbrellas shelter outdoor dining areas beneath a glowing Kiroshi sign. The movement then shifts from the open rain into a sheltered walkway with a glass ceiling, passing rows of illuminated vending machines and digital poster walls. Finally, the perspective glides through this covered corridor, where neon cyan lighting reflects off the surfaces as pedestrians pass by under the steady rhythm of the rain overhead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vast, open-air urban plaza into a confined, elevated walkway. It begins as the character emerges from a covered walkway into a wide expanse dominated by towering digital billboards and vibrant pink neon lighting, passing a figure with a glowing red sword near grand stairs and outdoor seating. As the character moves forward, the open environment shifts into a narrower passage enclosed by concrete walls and glass railings. The scene then tightens further under overhead structures that block the rain, with the lighting shifting from the broad glow of the plaza to focused neon floor lights that illuminate the path while maintaining a view of the levels below.
